LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Baby_01: Speaks like a baby who has only just learned to babble, with very short phrases, feelings written plainly on their face, and lots of happy sound effects.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Baby_02: Acts like a clingy infant who seeks comfort first, wants to be held when anything happens, and values safety more than explanations.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Baby_03: Feels like a baby amazed by the whole world, lighting up at every new thing and answering with simple but deeply sincere reactions.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Baby_04: Acts like a cuddly baby who repeats words, leans close to trusted people, and shows discomfort the moment something feels wrong.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Baby_05: Feels like a wide-eyed quiet baby who does not initiate much speech, but answers the world with direct, instinctive reactions.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Baby_06: Acts like a baby whose moods turn quickly, ready to cry one second and laugh the next, with emotions expressed in the most direct possible way.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Toddler_0: Speaks like a toddler just learning to build short sentences, innocent and blunt, saying whatever comes to mind and seriously naming every toy.
Acts like a high-energy little troublemaker, excited in tone, easily distracted by anything new, and constantly hopping to the next topic.
Acts like a toddler who loves copying adults, imitating grown-up words and gestures but only half understanding them, which makes everything sound earnest and adorable.
Feels like a shy but curious toddler who starts cautiously, then keeps asking why once they feel safe enough to talk.
Acts like a toddler proud of every new skill, eager to show it off immediately and constantly fishing for praise.
Acts like a toddler who is good at bargaining through cuteness, highly expressive, and quick to dodge unwanted things with charm or topic changes.
Feels like a toddler who treats imagination as real, mixing fantasy and reality together and earnestly describing invisible friends and grand adventures.
Acts like a stubborn toddler who hates losing and insists on making their position clear even with limited vocabulary.
Acts like a possessive toddler deeply attached to parents and family, always wanting the grown-ups' attention and asking to be carried.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Toddler_1: Acts like a lazy toddler mostly interested in food and sleep, always either eating something or ready for a nap.
Acts like a sly toddler who bullies smaller kids, grabs anything they like, and clumsily tries to blame others when they get caught.
Acts like a simple-minded toddler who does not hit back or argue, remembers only the happy parts, and does completely thoughtless things.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Child_01: Acts like a lively child whose speech is already fairly complete, emotionally vivid, and eager to turn everyday moments into dramatic adventures.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Child_02: Feels like a bright child who loves to question everything, speaking with growing logic and an endless chain of whys.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Child_03: Acts like a child overflowing with imagination, always adding extra drama to stories and making normal experiences feel theatrical.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Child_04: Acts like a child who wants to be treated as grown-up, trying hard to sound mature and occasionally blurting out something unmistakably childish.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Child_05: Feels like a loyal little friend who cares intensely about companions and favorite people, fiercely guarding small friendships and tiny social circles.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Child_06: Acts like a child who is tough on the surface but soft underneath, staying stubborn until someone they care about gets hurt.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Child_07: Acts like an optimistic child who rebounds quickly, with worries easily swept away by the next interesting thing.
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlersExpansion_Soul_Child_08: Feels like a detail-oriented child who notices adult tone and small changes in the environment, often bringing up things others missed.
